title: GearCoupledTARA
description: Extended TARA schema for the worldline-gears operationalization. Treats temporal arcs as mechanically coupled gears with ratios, phase alignment, and slippage tolerances.

gearRatio.description: Cadence ratio between source and target arcs (e.g. '3:1', '7:3')

phaseAlignment.description: Normalized phase match at transfer time (1 = perfect alignment)

slippageTolerance.description: Maximum allowable phase error before the coupling is considered failed

informationCapacity.description: Theoretical bits per gear cycle, derived from ratio and slippage tolerance

steganographicEncoding.description: Information embedding method in timing/phase relationships

mechanicalFailureModes.description: Observed or predicted failure modes for this coupling
